featured.title: PhishGuard
featured.desc: In an era where social engineering and accidental data exposure are leading causes of security breaches, PhishGuard acts as an active, contextual layer of defense living directly inside the user's email workflow — protecting against incoming phishing attacks and preventing outgoing confidential data leaks in real-time.
featured.longDesc: A machine learning-backed browser extension that automatically extracts and analyses email content and sender metadata. Incoming text is cleaned, normalised, and transformed via TF-IDF vectorisation before being evaluated by a customised Random Forest classifier — delivering an immediate security verdict and confidence score via a glassmorphism-styled React interface inside the browser.
highlights: Real-Time phishing probability scoring via Flask REST API + Scikit-learn
Data Loss Prevention — monitors outgoing compose windows for sensitive leaks
Dual-engine: Sender Analysis (spoofed domains) + Content Analysis (NLP signals)
Glassmorphism React UI with dark-mode aesthetics, non-intrusive security alerts

projects.title: Mini-CTF Platform
projects.desc: A premium, high-performance event platform for conducting Capture-the-Flag competitions. Features a cyber-elite interactive UI, real-time leaderboard, automated flag-scoring engine and single-event registration — built end-to-end.

projects.title: AI Project Manager
projects.desc: Autonomous project assistant powered by Generative AI. Breaks down goals, assigns tasks, tracks progress and generates weekly reports via a Flask API.

projects.title: Solasta Tech Fest
projects.desc: Event management website for the annual CS-department tech fest. Handles registration, live result updates and 500+ concurrent visitors.

projects.title: AIKudumbam
projects.desc: A delightfully interactive web application that lovingly simulates a classic Keralite family gathering in the digital age, powered by AI-generated characters.

projects.title: School Website
projects.desc: A user-friendly static website for National Higher Secondary School providing easy access to school information and resources.

items.title: Full-Stack Development
items.desc: Designing and building complete web applications from frontend to backend with clean architecture and production-ready standards.

items.title: Backend & API Engineering
items.desc: Architecting secure, scalable backend systems with robust authentication, structured databases, and clean RESTful APIs.

items.title: System Design & Optimization
items.desc: Improving performance, structuring scalable backends, and building efficient data-driven applications.

profile.name: Athul Menon
profile.bio: CS undergraduate building full-stack systems with a focus on security, performance, and clean architecture. Writes React for clarity, engineers backends for scale, and believes software should be fast, correct — and occasionally beautiful.

about.quote: "From frontend interactions to backend architecture — I design systems, not just interfaces"
paragraphs: I'm a dedicated Computer Science undergraduate at NSS College of Engineering with an 8.5 CGPA and a genuine passion for building interfaces that are as thoughtful as they are functional.
My coursework has given me a solid grounding in Java, Python, and C++, alongside web technologies like HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

My practical work spans collaborative projects — from building the Solasta tech-fest platform to designing static sites for schools. I bring strong problem-solving instincts, an eye for detail, and the kind of curiosity that keeps me reaching for the terminal long after the workday ends.
I'm a quick learner who thrives in teams, adapts to new challenges fast, and is always looking for the next thing to build. Currently open to freelance work and internship opportunities.

lines.out: JavaScript · Python · Java · C++ · HTML · CSS

experience.desc: Built the annual CS department tech-fest platform with event registration and real-time updates.
Designed and developed a static website providing easy access to school information and resources.
Pursuing Computer Science with a strong foundation in algorithms, systems, and web technologies.
